username.description: Guru account email address, used as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: Guru API token, used as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Guru API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
